ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data entry */,
  "ask" REAL /* Ask price of the instrument */,
  "bid" REAL /* Bid price of the instrument */,
  "ask_volume" INTEGER /* Volume at the ask price */,
  "bid_volume" INTEGER /* Volume at the bid price */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for forex pairs */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume (sum of ask_volume and bid_volume) */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* Last trade price for the instrument */,
  "last_trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last trade */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the time interval */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the time interval */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price for the time interval */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price for the time interval */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the market data (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument (e.g., EURUSD, AAPL) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument (e.g., Euro/US Dollar, Apple Inc.) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., forex, stock, commodity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Name of the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "settlement_currency" TEXT /* Currency used for settlement */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Minimum price movement for the instrument */,
  "lot_size" INTEGER /* Standard trading unit for the instrument */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours for the instrument */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Contract size for futures and options */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date for futures and options */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Score indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the data source was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., trading, research, compliance) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_logout_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged out */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being traded */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade execution */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "execution_venue" TEXT /* Venue where the trade was executed */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference for the trade */,
  "counterparty" TEXT /* Counterparty involved in the trade */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Settlement date for the trade */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy used for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being tracked */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Execution ID if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument associated with the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price break, volume spike, news release) */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "sent_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the alert was sent */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message for the alert */,
  "resolved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sent_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("sent_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, volatility measurement) */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the report */,
  "visualization" TEXT /* Type of visualization used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument (if applicable) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "permission_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., global, specific instrument) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news entry */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news source */,
  "publish_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the news to the market (0-1) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news (e.g., economic, company-specific) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the news source */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image related to the news */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_instrument_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relation entry */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score of the news on the instrument (0-1) */,
  "impact_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the impact in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_instrument_relations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_instrument_relations_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news_feeds ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archive entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being archived */,
  "archive_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was archived */,
  "archive_reason" TEXT /* Reason for archiving the data (e.g., end of trading day, compliance) */,
  "archive_status" TEXT /* Status of the archived data (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "archive_type" TEXT /* Type of archive (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)
